_publications._publicationTitle: Optical coherence tomography of the macular ganglion cell layer in children with neurofibromatosis type 1 is a useful tool in the assessment for optic pathway gliomas.

_contextSnippet: GC-IPL data were obtained in 132 eyes (Complete scans 88%) from 71 patients...GC-IPL was obtained in 95% eyes without symptomatic OPG and in 69% eyes with OPG
resourceName: Cirrus HD-OCT device (Cirrus; Carl Zeiss Meditec, Dublin, CA, USA)
details: GC-IPL data were obtained in 132 eyes (Complete scans 88%) from 71 patients, with 95% success rate in eyes without symptomatic OPG and 69% success rate in eyes with OPG
